changeSet.author: hanan
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION notify_hl7_patient_event() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $function$ BEGIN INSERT INTO ${hl7.integrationSchema}.hl7_event ( id, event_type, object_key, event_datetime ) VALUES ( gen_random_uuid()::varchar, CASE WHEN TG_OP = 'INSERT' THEN '${hl7.events.patientRegistered}' WHEN TG_OP = 'UPDATE' THEN '${hl7.events.patientUpdated}' END, NEW.id::varchar, NOW() );
RETURN NEW; END; $function$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
